template.name: Brand Cover (content)

t.t-elif: not section.video_src and section.brand_id and section.brand_id.heritage_image
not section.video_src and section.model_id and section.model_id.image

div.t-if: not section.video_src and not section.video_embed_url and not section.image and not (section.brand_id and section.brand_id.heritage_image) and not (section.model_id and section.model_id.image)

template.div: Create a published Brand Cover in Website Sections to populate this block.

template.name: Featured Model (content)

a.t-if: not section or section.secondary_cta_url or section.secondary_cta_label

template.div: Publish a car model (and tick Featured on Home) to populate this section.

template.name: Model Specs (content)
template.div: Add specifications to the featured car model (Specifications tab) to populate this section.

template.name: Dealer Locator (content)

t.t-value: dealers or env['bs.car.dealer'].sudo().with_context(website_id=current_website.id).search( [('active', '=', True), ('website_published', '=', True), ('company_id', 'in', [False, current_website.company_id.id])], order='sequence, id')

h2.t-esc: locator_title or 'Find a dealer near you'

template.div: Publish a dealer/showroom to populate this section.

template.name: Offers (content)
template.div: Publish a promotional offer (and set its validity dates) to populate this section.

template.name: Brand Heritage (content)
template.div: Add a brand and tick Featured Brand (with a Heritage story) to populate this section.

template.name: Latest Arrivals (content)
template.div: Publish a car model (and set its Arrival Date) to populate this section.

template.name: Model Stage (content)

div.t-if: section and (section.primary_cta_label or section.secondary_cta_label or section.primary_cta_url or section.secondary_cta_url)

template.div: Publish a car model to populate this section.

button.t-att-data-interior-ids: ','.join(['int-%s' % i for i in (option.interior_option_ids.ids or int_options.ids)])

t.t-esc: (section and section.title) or 'Signature details, engineered for arrival'

t.t-value: section and (section.video_src or section.video_embed_url or section.image)

t.t-esc: (section and section.eyebrow) or (cabin_item and cabin_item.subtitle) or 'Crafted Sanctuary'

h2.t-esc: (section and section.title) or (cabin_item and cabin_item.name) or 'A cabin composed in silence'

div.h2: The journey behind the red flag
